/usr/bin/c++ -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -O3 -g -fPIC -march=native -O3 -g -fPIC -D __FILENAME__='"$$(subst  /Users/igor/Documents/[08] Projetos/[16]_DW_Decomp/,,$$(abspath $$<))"' -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib -L/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib -L/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib -o libDwDecomp.dylib -install_name @rpath/libDwDecomp.dylib CMakeFiles/DwDecomp.dir/src/DW_Decomp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DwDecomp.dir/src/BranchAndPrice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DwDecomp.dir/src/SearchStrategy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DwDecomp.dir/src/PrimalHeuristic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DwDecomp.dir/src/Branch.cpp.o   -L/Library/gurobi1203/macos_universal2/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Library/gurobi1203/macos_universal2/lib -lgurobi_c++ -lgurobi
